sections.description: Page sections. MyndHyve's in-tree executor reads these from useCampaignStudioStore; the pack expects the caller to resolve + pass them in. Each section: { id, type, content: { headline, description, ctaText, features[], testimonials[], stats[], plans[], items[] — type-specific keys } }

pageTitle.description: Page title; mapped to brief.contentContext.productName when contentContext isn't supplied.

contentContext.description: Optional pre-built ContentContext. When absent the executor derives it from extracted content + objective.
